clauses.statement: An inline Markdown destination beginning with docs/ is projected as a canonical GitHub blob URL, or a raw URL for images; angle wrappers are removed and spaces are percent encoded.

A prose docs link is normalized while inline code, blockquote/list-contained fenced code, and non-docs destinations remain unchanged; an unclosed fence stops protecting content when its container ends.
HTTP(S), anchor, mailto, site-root relative, and non-docs relative destinations remain unchanged.
HTML and Vue interpolation sanitization and PR-number idempotent upsert remain intact.

test_pattern.must_contain: PCR-CON-002/003 projects a PR #350-shaped entry idempotently

clauses.statement: English and Japanese release history and CHANGELOG receive the same normalized idempotent note.

test_pattern.must_contain: PCR-CON-002/003 projects a PR #350-shaped entry idempotently

diagrams.title: Release note projection boundary
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  PR[PR Release Notes] --> Normalize[docs link normalization]
  Normalize --> Escape[HTML and Vue escape once]
  Escape --> EN[English release]
  Escape --> JA[Japanese release]
  Escape --> Changelog[CHANGELOG]

diagrams.title: Markdown segment handling
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Prose
  Prose --> Normalized: destination starts docs/
  Prose --> Prose: other destination
  Prose --> InlineCode: backtick
  InlineCode --> Prose: backtick
  Prose --> FencedCode: fence open
  FencedCode --> Prose: fence close
